name: gitig
description: A fast CLI for generating, combining, detecting, and compacting .gitignore files.

scripts.clean: node -e "import('node:fs/promises').then(fs => fs.rm('dist', { recursive: true, force: true }))"
scripts.build: npm run clean && tsc -p tsconfig.json && chmod +x dist/gitig.js
scripts.test: npm run build && node dist/gitig.js selftest
